seoDescription: Transparent, usage-aware pricing for multimodal inference with predictable billing controls.

elements.text: dryAPI combines prepaid credits, plan-based guardrails, and usage telemetry so teams can scale AI features without billing surprises.

hero.heading: Pricing That Scales With Usage
hero.body: Choose plan tiers that map to your throughput, latency, and support requirements while preserving clear margin visibility.

sections.title: Choose The Right Plan
sections.body: Start with a lightweight developer plan and move to business tiers with higher throughput, governance, and support.

cards.title: Developer Launch
cards.description: Ideal for prototypes, internal tools, and early feature validation.

cards.title: Growth Workloads
cards.description: Scale concurrent requests with more predictable latency and budget controls.

cards.title: Enterprise Controls
cards.description: Get advanced SLAs, routing policy support, and procurement-ready billing.

sections.title: Margin-Aware Operations
sections.body: Align product pricing with provider costs using guardrails, caching opportunities, and traffic shaping.

cards.title: Usage Forecasting
cards.description: Estimate spend before launches using request and token projections.

cards.title: Billing Integrity
cards.description: Track credits and balance changes with auditable event flows.

cards.title: Optimization Loops
cards.description: Reduce cost per request with batching, routing, and response caching.

contactPanel.heading: Need custom pricing guidance?
contactPanel.body: Share expected traffic and model mix, and we will recommend a plan and rollout strategy aligned to margin targets.
contactPanel.responseTime: Pricing advisory response in under one business day
